content:
## 研究方向 / Research Areas
- 土壤侵蚀过程与机理 (Soil Erosion Processes and Mechanisms): 研究土壤侵蚀过程与机理，关注气候变化、降雨径流等对坡面侵蚀的影响，揭示不同环境因子驱动下的侵蚀产沙规律。
- 多源遥感定量监测 (Multi-source Remote Sensing Monitoring): 利用InSAR、Google Earth Engine等多源遥感技术，定量监测土壤侵蚀、地表变化等过程的时空演变特征。
- 土壤有机碳形成与转化 (Soil Organic Carbon Dynamics): 探究土壤有机碳的形成、转化与稳定机制，关注微生物驱动的碳循环过程及其对全球变化的响应。
- 植物多样性与土壤水碳耦合 (Plant Diversity & Soil Water-Carbon Coupling): 研究植物多样性如何影响土壤水分运移和碳循环过程，揭示植物-土壤-水分的耦合机制，为生态系统管理提供科学依据。

## 团队成员 / Team Members
- 刘华清 (Huaqing Liu), 助理教授 / 博士, 广西大学林学院, Email: huaqingliu@gxu.edu.cn
  授课: 数据采集与预处理, 恢复生态学, 景观生态学
  招生方向: 生态学（学硕）；林业（专硕）；风景园林（专硕）
  简介: 主要关注植物多样性与土壤水碳耦合关系、土壤有机碳形成与转化机制和土壤侵蚀与水土保持等方向。综合采用公共数据库、荟萃（meta）分析和野外以及室内实验等方法，开展全球、区域和样地尺度的土壤生态学、森林生态系统和生态水文等方向的研究。
- 杨佳慧 (Jiahui Yang), 助理教授 / 博士, 广西大学农学院, Email: jiahuiyang@gxu.edu.cn
  授课: 水土保持学
  招生方向: 农业资源与环境（学硕）；资源利用与植物保护（专硕）
  简介: 主要研究方向为多源遥感定量监测、热融灾害时空分布特征、水土保持与气候变化、土壤侵蚀过程与机理。

- Huaqing Liu, Yaohui Cai*, Xiaodong Gao, Long Ma, Heng Liu, Xining Zhao: "Grass species diversity reduces water and nutrient loss under simulated extreme precipitation". Journal of Hydrology, 2026. DOI: 10.1016/j.jhydrol.2025.134499
- Huaqing Liu, Xiaodong Gao*, Long Ma, Heng Liu, Xining Zhao: "Herbaceous species richness enhances soil hydraulic conductivity by increasing soil pore connectivity". Journal of Hydrology, 2025. DOI: 10.1016/j.jhydrol.2025.134218
- Huaqing Liu, Xiaodong Gao, Xining Zhao*: "Scale-dependent effects of tree diversity on soil erosion resistance". Resources, Environment and Sustainability, 2025. DOI: 10.1016/j.resenv.2025.100221
- Huaqing Liu, Xiaodong Gao, Changjian Li, Yaohui Cai, Xiaolin Song, Xining Zhao*: "Intercropping increases plant water availability and water use efficiency: A synthesis". Agriculture, Ecosystems and Environment, 2025. DOI: 10.1016/j.agee.2024.109360
- Huaqing Liu, Xiaodong Gao, Changjian Li, Long Ma, Kadambot H.M. Siddique, Xining Zhao*: "Short-term plant mixtures alter soil organic carbon components and microbial network characteristics". European Journal of Soil Biology, 2024. DOI: 10.1016/j.ejsobi.2024.103650
- Huaqing Liu, Jiahui Yang, Yanfang Diao*, Tingwu Lei*, Abass E. Rahma: "The hydrodynamic mechanism of rainfall runoff from loess slopes treated with incorporated straw". Land Degradation & Development, 2021. DOI: 10.1002/ldr.3941
- Huaqing Liu, Jiahui Yang, Chuanxiao Liu, Yanfang Diao*, Depeng Ma, Fahu Li, Abass E. Rahma, Tingwu Lei*: "Flow velocity on cultivated soil slope with wheat straw incorporation". Journal of Hydrology, 2020. DOI: 10.1016/j.jhydrol.2020.124667
- Jiahui Yang, Nasem Badreldin, Yanchen Gao, Changchao Yan, Yizhan Zhao, Miles Dyck, Hailong He*: "Innovative methods for monitoring soil erosion: Utilizing InSAR technology effectively". Catena, 2025. DOI: 10.1016/j.catena.2025.109547
- Jiahui Yang, Ruhan Zhang, Xiaobin Li, Xiangwei Wang, Miles Dyck, Luyang Wang, Qingbai Wu, Hailong He*: "Soil property changes following a thaw-induced mass movement event in the permafrost region of the Qinghai-Tibetan Plateau". Catena, 2025. DOI: 10.1016/j.catena.2025.108850
- Jiahui Yang, Yanchen Gao, Lang Jia, Wenjuan Wang, Qingbai Wu, Francis Zvomuya, Miles Dyck, Hailong He*: "Enhanced detection of freeze-thaw induced landslides in Zhidoi county (Tibetan Plateau, China) with Google Earth Engine and image fusion". Advances in Climate Change Research, 2024. DOI: 10.1016/j.accre.2024.03.002
- Jiahui Yang, Autar K. Mattoo, Yang Liu*, Francis Zvomuya, Hailong He*: "Trade-offs of organic and organic-inorganic fertilizer combinations in tomato quality and yield: A global meta-analysis (1992-2021)". European Journal of Agronomy, 2023. DOI: 10.1016/j.eja.2023.126985
- Jiahui Yang, Huaixin Wei, Zelin Quan, Rui Xu, Zhaohui Wang, Hailong He*: "A global meta-analysis of coal mining studies provides insights into the hydrologic cycle at watershed scale". Journal of Hydrology, 2022. DOI: 10.1016/j.jhydrol.2022.129023
- Jiahui Yang, Gaolin Wu, Miles Dyck, Hailong He*: "Freeze-thaw induced landslides on grassland in cold regions". Catena, 2022. DOI: 10.1016/j.catena.2022.106650
- Jiahui Yang, Huaqing Liu, Junpeng Zhang*, Abass E. Rahma, Tingwu Lei*: "Lab simulation of soil erosion on cultivated soil slopes with wheat straw incorporation". Catena, 2022. DOI: 10.1016/j.catena.2021.105865
- Jiahui Yang, Huaqing Liu, Junpeng Zhang*, Abass E. Rahma, Tingwu Lei*: "Effect of straw-incorporation into farming soil layer on surface runoff under simulated rainfall". Catena, 2021. DOI: 10.1016/j.catena.2020.105082
- Xiangwei Wang, Yanchen Gao, Jiagui Hou, Jiahui Yang, Kathleen Smits, Hailong He*: "Machine learning facilitates connections between soil thermal conductivity, soil water content, and soil matric potential". Journal of Hydrology, 2024. DOI: 10.1016/j.jhydrol.2024.130950
- Xiaofeng Gao, Xiaonan Shi*, Tingwu Lei, Huaqing Liu, Jiahui Yang: "An experimental investigation of the effects of thawed soil depth on rill flow velocity". Hydrological Processes, 2021. DOI: 10.1002/hyp.14043
- Yanchen Gao, Jiahui Yang, Xiaoyu Chen, Xiangwei Wang, Jinbo Li, Nasrin Azad, Francis Zvomuya, Hailong He*: "Using advanced InSAR techniques and Machine learning in Google Earth Engine (GEE) to monitor regional black soil erosion". Remote Sensing, 2024. DOI: N/A
- Xiaobin Li, Xiaoyu Chen, Yanchen Gao, Jiahui Yang, Weiting Ding, Francis Zvomuya, Nasrin Azad, Jinbo Li, Hailong He*: "Freezing induced soil water redistribution: A review and global meta-analysis". Journal of Hydrology, 2024. DOI: 10.1016/j.jhydrol.2024.132594
- 马龙, 刘华清, 高晓东, 赵西宁*: "饲草间作方式对增产及节水效应的影响". 水土保持通报, 2025. DOI: 10.13961/j.cnki.stbctb.2025.04.027
- 王一帆, 刘华清, 赵西宁*, 高晓东: "禾豆间作系统水分和根系分隔对牧草氮素吸收利用及转移的影响". 水土保持学报, 2024. DOI: N/A
- 马南方, 高晓东*, 赵西宁, 赵连豪, 刘华清, 杨孟豪: "黄土丘陵区退耕小流域土壤有机碳分布特征及地形植被对其的影响". 生态学报, 2022. DOI: N/A
- 敖登, 杨佳慧, 丁维婷, 安韶山, 何海龙*: "54种植被指数研究进展综述". 安徽农业科学, 2022. DOI: 10.3969/j.issn.0517-6611.2023.01.004
- 孟书翰, 厉晓峰, 杨佳慧, 雷廷武*: "黄绵土细沟水流输沙能力对地表冲刷流量的响应". 水土保持学报, 2022. DOI: 10.13870/j.cnki.stbcxb.2022.06.009
- 亓波, 李靖江, 高崧, 孟书翰, 杨佳慧, 雷廷武*: "掺沙对盐渍土土块崩解和土壤盐分淋洗的影响机理". 水土保持学报, 2021. DOI: 10.13870/j.cnki.stbcxb.2021.06.049

## 科研项目 / Projects
- 树种多样性调控多源DOM输入驱动土壤碳形成与稳定 (Tree Species Diversity Regulates Multi-source DOM Input Driving Soil Carbon Formation and Stabilization), 广西自然科学基金青年科学基金项目, 2026.01–2028.12, 状态: ongoing
- 广西坡耕地土壤侵蚀定量评价与未来趋势预测 (Quantitative Assessment and Future Trend Prediction of Soil Erosion on Sloping Farmland in Guangxi), 广西自然科学基金青年科学基金项目, 2026.01–2028.12, 状态: ongoing
- 高层次人才启动经费 (High-level Talent Start-up Fund), 广西大学, 2025.08–2031.08, 状态: ongoing
- 中国科协青年人才托举工程博士生专项计划 (CAST Young Talent Support Program for Doctoral Students), 中国科学技术协会, 2024.01–2025.12, 状态: completed
- 混交林根系重塑土壤孔隙网络调控水碳迁移的机理研究 (Mechanisms of Mixed Forest Root Systems Reshaping Soil Pore Networks to Regulate Water-Carbon Migration), 广西森林生态与保育重点实验室开放课题, 2026.01–2027.12, 状态: ongoing
- 国家自然科学基金区域创新联合基金重点项目 (NSFC Regional Innovation Joint Fund Key Project), 国家自然科学基金, 2023.01–2026.12, 状态: ongoing
- 十四五重点研发计划项目 (14th Five-Year National Key R&D Program), 科技部, 2021.07–2025.12, 状态: completed
- 高层次人才启动经费 (High-level Talent Start-up Fund), 广西大学, 2025.08–2031.08, 状态: ongoing

## 招生信息 / Join Us
课题组隶属广西大学，欢迎生态学、土壤学、水文学、林学、农业资源与环境、遥感等相关专业背景的学生报考。
网站: https://soil-ecology-lab.vercel.app
广西大学研究生招生网: https://yjsc.gxu.edu.cn/zsgz/bszs.htm
